expectations.text: Explains terminal notification as a signal rather than a success/failure result
expectations.evidence: Clearly says it is a bell/notification signal, not a success/failure conclusion.
Tells the reader to inspect the existing task and its output before deciding what to do.

expectations.text: Uses task-management framing rather than making tmux the main topic
expectations.evidence: Frames the event around the background task and treats tmux as the implementation detail.
